title: Keep heavy work out of the change-detection path
description: Avoid expensive computation in templates and getters that re-run on every change-detection cycle.
body: Use when a template calls a method/getter or filters a list inline. Do not put expensive computation in a template expression or component getter, since change detection re-evaluates it every cycle. Actions: move the computation to a pure pipe (cached by input), a memoized signal/derived value, or precompute on input change; for very hot paths run work outside Angular with NgZone.runOutsideAngular and re-enter to update. Validation signals include a profiler trace showing the expression is not recomputed each tick and a test that the pipe is invoked only when inputs change. Risk boundary: per-cycle recomputation causes visible jank in large views; verify with the Angular DevTools profiler before and after.
